title: Deluxe Paws Plush Cuddly Soft Eco Toys 100% Recycled (Elephant)
features: Plush Cuddly Soft Eco Toys, 100% Recycled: beautiful, better for our life, the environment and sustainability.
These children's soft toys are available in many styles approx 18cm-25cm.
Manufactured and stuffed with 100% recycled polyester from plastic waste.
description: Product Description The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products. The video shows the product being unpacked. Deluxe Paws bring you Keel Toys iconic 100% recycled Eco Plush An exciting new range, Keeleco, showcases the latest British manufacturing and design technologies to bring new super soft fabrics suitable for all ages but helping to create a better environment for future generations. Features: 100% Recycled 100% Huggable ECO soft toys including wild, jungle, woodland, sea life and farm animals. Recycled: Manufactured with rPET polyester from 100% recycled plastic. Approx 10 water bottles makes a 18cm toy, 14 bottles 25cm toy and 16 bottles a 30cm toy Sustainable: The Keeleco process gives plastic a second life and uses up to 59 percent less energy to produce than virgin polyester. Design & Safety: UK Design, Toy authenticated by the iconic Keel Toys FSC card disc. British safety standard BS EN 71 & European safety standard EN71 hand washable. Innovative Designs and Cutting Edge Fabrics Toys you will love and cherish We combine innovative design with cutting edge fabrics, technologies and finishing techniques to create the most modern and more importantly beautiful range of soft toys in the market place today! … and by the way we have a lot of fun doing it too! Less damage to the world you love Because these plush are made of 100% recycled plastics landfill is reduced, oil and natural resources are saved for future generations. In just the three years after launching Keeleco we have recycled the incredible figure of more than 100 million water bottles in the creation of the range Commitment to the Environment Changing Designs Adorable embroidered eyes replaced unnecessary plastics for a unique and playful look. Keel Toys Iconic Hang Tag converted from plastic to card Transport packaging updated New manufacturing 59% less energy used to make recycled polyester. 10 water bottles create an 18cm toy! Each toy is made from 100% recycled plastic fabrics, recycled glass beans and a recycled sew in label Well Made Gifts Working in partnership with Keel Toys Official suppliers and Amazon partners of Keel Toys. View our exclusive Deluxe Paws plush lines in our Amazon store. All our packing uses recycled plastics and can be recycled in supermarkets.
